methodologie.header_desc: All our metrics are based on official reports and documented calculation protocols.

water.title: Water preserved from pollution
water.desc: A single cigarette butt can pollute up to 500 to 1000 liters of water by releasing heavy metals and microplastics (Source: WHO/Tobacco and its environmental impact, 2017). We use the lower bound ({val}L) to ensure a conservative estimate.

co2.title: CO2 Emissions avoided
co2.desc: This factor corresponds to the average emissions avoided by collection and controlled treatment compared to leaving it in nature (fermentation, microplastics). This figure is derived from the ADEME Empreinte database for the standard urban waste mix.

surface.title: Operational impact area
surface.desc: Unlike direct physical metrics, our area calculation is a "field penetration" index. It combines cleaning density (collected weight) and prospecting effort (time spent) to simulate the influence zone of an action.

map.title: Field Pollution Index (Map)
map.desc: Used to color the interactive map, this score normalizes the observed pollution on a scale of 0 to 100%. A score of 100% (Purple) represents an area requiring a major intervention (e.g., 20kg of waste or 2000 concentrated butts). The color interpolation (Green → Yellow → Red → Purple) follows a logic of operational criticality.
map.source: SOURCE: CleanMyMap v1 field calibration algorithm.

roi.title: Street-cleaning savings for the city (ROI)
roi.desc: This economic proxy estimates the cost avoided for municipal street-cleaning services. Based on urban cleanliness cost reports, citizen collection saves about €1.50 per kilogram removed (including logistics, urban labor, and treatment costs).
roi.source: SOURCE: Estimate based on average urban cleanliness costs (Observed average: €1500 / ton).

learnHub.header_desc: Learn, organize, and act. Everything you need to know to become an ambassador of change.

enjeux.title: The 7th Continent.
enjeux.desc: Every minute, the equivalent of a plastic garbage truck is dumped into the ocean. On CleanMyMap, we map this invisible pollution to force public action.
enjeux.quote: "We can only protect what we understand."

usage.step1_desc: While walking, report a pollution hotspot using the 'Express Report' button.
usage.step2_desc: Collect waste, alone or in a group, and photograph the result.
usage.step3_desc: Declare your action to turn your kilos into real impact points.
usage.step4_desc: Check your statistics and download your impact certificate.

dashboard.objective_v2: Guide operational prioritization with a short decision summary, then targeted analytics without duplicating Compare, Climate, and Reports.
dashboard.section1_desc: Actionable short-term reading: impact, quality, coverage, mobilization, moderation delay.
dashboard.section2_desc: Service status and verification of sensitive executions.
dashboard.section3_desc: Quick action declaration directly from the home page.
dashboard.trace_good: medium to high depending on available metrics
dashboard.trace_source: Sources: validated actions, pilotage overview module, N/N-1 derived metrics.
dashboard.trace_method: Method: absolute and relative deltas over a 30-day window. Scope: overview cockpit.
dashboard.desc_v1: Decision management focused on field impact, tracking, and data reliability.
